disclosure_label: REHEARSAL — NOT EXTERNAL VALIDATION. Self-authorized verification-lane rehearsal on Northset's own repository; not a real external maintainer request.

repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: Northset owns the repository and self-authorized this bounded verification-lane rehearsal; it is not an external maintainer request.

limitations: Self-authorized on Northset's own repository; not a real external maintainer request or external maintainer verification.

Docker was unavailable to this managed session, so the declared node:test check ran through the pipeline's host fallback without container or network isolation; the pinned image and phaseA:bridge,phaseB:none policy are declared targets only.
The recorded patch stands in for a small Northset-authored pull request change; no pull request was opened.
